text:

  (( ( err ) == kPGPError_NoErr ) || err == kPGPError_UserAbort) not true

  (( ( err ) == kPGPError_NoErr ) || err == kPGPError_UserAbort) not true

For a usage summary, type:  pgp -h
ASSERTION FAILED at groups.c line 127:
  (( ( err ) == kPGPError_NoErr ) || err == kPGPError_UserAbort) not true

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/security/pgp6 && make install && pgp
